calendar.matters:
Petition For Order For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Of Testamentary Trusts.
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Spencer Chen for Jeffrey Masonek.

The Court granted the Petition for Order for Appointment of Successor Trustee of Testamentary Trusts (subject to a revised order and bond for 50% of the assets and 50% of the income). Counsel is to speak with the bond company representative to determine the amount of the bond and whether one or two bonds will be required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Of Testamentary Trusts.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
